The description '250.2.9' is derived directly from the visible text on the row, which includes the total amount itself. gemini-flash included '£' in the description (which is a column header, not part of the line's specific descriptive text), while gpt-5-mini left the description blank. Visual verification confirms the numbers constitute the row's 'description'.
